title: Balance wheels and tyres
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Balance wheels and tyres demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to balance wheels and tyres

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret wheel balancing information from manufacturer specifications 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and examine for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret wheel balancing information from manufacturer specifications 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and examine for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret wheel balancing information from manufacturer specifications 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and examine for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to balance wheels and tyres

elements.title: Conduct wheel and tyre pre-balance inspection

pcs.text: Carry out wheel and tyre pre-balance inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures, including recommendations for necessary repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out wheel and tyre pre-balance inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures, including recommendations for necessary repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out wheel and tyre pre-balance inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures, including recommendations for necessary repair or replacement.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct wheel and tyre pre-balance inspection

elements.title: Carry out balancing procedures

pcs.text: Inspect wheel balancing machine according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.2 Balance wheel according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements without causing damage to wheel or tyre
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect wheel balancing machine according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.2 Balance wheel according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements without causing damage to wheel or tyre?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect wheel balancing machine according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.2 Balance wheel according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements without causing damage to wheel or tyre.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out balancing procedures

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Carry out final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle and wheels are ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle and wheels are ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle and wheels are ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
